payload.label: tv
payload.short_description: dark glossy TV bottom edge crop
payload.long_description: Lower portion of a dark glossy flat‑screen TV showing the bottom bezel and partial stand, with a small white sticker/label at the lower-right; screen surface reflects a lamp on the left, the panel is edge‑cropped and appears close to the camera (about 1.0 m away).
